welcomeTitle: How to Unbind OCBC mobile to new phone!

inputPasswordSubtitle: Input your Password to log into OCBC mobile
forgotUserId: Forgot or Haven't Received User ID Yet?

loginSubtitle: Please input the data below to log in to your account.
networkError: Network error, please try again later
forgotPasswordMessage: Please recover your password in the OCBC APP
passwordErrorMessage: The account or password you entered is incorrect, please try again
captchaErrorMessage: The OTP you entered is incorrect, please try again
enterOtp: Please enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your phone
otpSecurityExplanation: OTP is required to protect your account security. This one-time password has been sent to your registered phone number.
otpHelp: OTP is a 6-digit one-time password sent to your registered phone. If you didn't receive it, please check your phone signal or try again later.
paymentPasswordErrorMessage: The payment password you entered is incorrect, please try again
successMessage: Your OCBC bank account has been successfully linked
successDescription: Account linking completed. Withdrawal requests will be transferred to this bank account
failedDescription: We were unable to verify your account information. Please check your details or contact support for assistance.
maintenanceMessage: System is under maintenance, please try again later
maintenanceDescription: We are performing system upgrades to provide better service. Service will resume shortly. Thank you for your patience.
